action.description: The specific Office365 action to perform from the available tools.

query.description: A search query string (e.g., 'from:boss@example.com'). Used by 'search_emails' and 'search_calendar_events'.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return. Used by 'search_emails' and 'search_calendar_events'.

subject.description: The subject line. Used by 'send_email' and 'create_calendar_event'.

body.description: The body content (HTML or text). Used by 'send_email' and 'create_calendar_event'.

to_recipients.description: A list of recipient email addresses. Used by 'send_email'.

cc_recipients.description: A list of CC recipient email addresses. Used by 'send_email'.

bcc_recipients.description: A list of BCC recipient email addresses. Used by 'send_email'.

folder_id.description: The optional ID of a specific mail folder to search in. Used by 'search_emails'.

start_time.description: The start time for an event or search range in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2025-10-31T09:00:00').

end_time.description: The end time for an event or search range in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2025-10-31T10:00:00').

attendees.description: A list of attendee email addresses. Used by 'create_calendar_event'.

location.description: The location of the event. Used by 'create_calendar_event'.

calendar_id.description: The optional ID of a specific calendar to search. Used by 'search_calendar_events'.

folder_path.description: The path to a folder in OneDrive (e.g., 'Documents/Reports'). Used by 'list_onedrive_files'.

file_path.description: The path to a file in OneDrive (e.g., 'Documents/report.txt'). Used by 'read_onedrive_file' and 'write_onedrive_file'.

content.description: The string content to write to a file. Used by 'write_onedrive_file'.
